---
title: "Projects"
---

Use this page for projects, publications, documentation, reports, training materials, or other work you want to share.

::: {.project-card}
## Project One

**Status:** In progress

Describe the project in two or three sentences. Focus on the problem, your contribution, and the result or intended outcome.

[View the repository](https://github.com/YOUR-USERNAME/YOUR-REPOSITORY)
:::

::: {.project-card}
## Project Two

**Status:** Complete

Describe another project or resource. You can add images, links, tables, citations, or executable code to a Quarto page.

[Learn more](https://quarto.org/docs/authoring/markdown-basics.html)
:::

## Add another project

Copy one of the project sections above, change its title and content, and preview the site to confirm the layout still works.
